ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the financial instrument (e.g., equity, fixed income) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the financial instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_open" REAL /* Adjusted opening price of the stock */,
  "adj_high" REAL /* Adjusted highest price of the stock */,
  "adj_low" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price of the stock */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "trading_session" TEXT /* Trading session (e.g., morning, afternoon) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading history record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading history record */,
  "buy_sell" TEXT /* Type of trade (buy or sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "trading_strategy" TEXT /* Trading strategy used for the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., market order, limit order) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend record */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the financial instrument */,
  "payout_ratio" REAL /* Payout ratio of the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each split record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the split record */,
  "split_factor" REAL /* Split factor of the split */,
  "pre_split_price" REAL /* Price of the financial instrument before the split */,
  "post_split_price" REAL /* Price of the financial instrument after the split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_splits_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_flows" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund flow record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the fund flow record */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the fund flow */,
  "flow_type" TEXT /* Type of fund flow (e.g., inflow, outflow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_flows_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., research, trading) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
